params.prompt: Use the attached reference image to include the real founder/speaker as a human visual anchor. Create an ultra-clean 4:5 PROGRAM GRAPHIC / social ad for Limitless Club. Founder portrait should be realistic and warm, light gray blazer, black shirt, confident smile. Minimal luxury layout: matte black background, one thin glowing blue frame, silver-white typography, huge negative space. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; Chief of Staff Agent; Content Agent; Vibe Coding Agent; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Make it less sci-fi, more premium founder/course ad. Safe margins, no clutter, no extra logos, no misspelled duplicate text.
